content:
Character: Cassian Moreau
Perception: Cassian is beautiful — tall, dark-eyed, carries a saxophone case like an extension of his arm. I've heard him play on the rooftop late at night when I'm coming home. The music stops me on the sidewalk sometimes. He nodded at me once on the stairs at 2 AM, no judgment in his face, just recognition of another person who lives in the dark hours. I don't think he knows what I do, or maybe he does and doesn't care. Either way, he's never looked at me with that specific pity I can spot from a block away. He seems talented and sad. I know his father died.
summary:

I don't think he knows what I do, or maybe he does and doesn't care. Either way, he's never looked at me with that specific pity I can spot from a block away. He seems talented and sad.
